subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou seest my state and my dwelling-place, the weakness of Thy loved ones, the power of Thine enemies, and the helplessness of Thy chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی زی حالی و مقری و ضعف احبائی و قدرة اعدائی و عجز اصفیائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
